verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You ask me why I'm happy so I'll just tell you why, Because my sins are gone; And when I meet the scoffers who ask me where they are, I say, "My sins are gone."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: They're underneath the blood on the cross of Calvary, As far removed as darkness is from dawn; In the sea of God's forgetfulness, that's good enough for me, Praise God, my sins are gone!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Twas at the old-time altar where God came in my heart And now my sins are gone; The Lord took full possession, the devil did depart, I'm glad my sins are gone!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When Satan comes to tempt me and tries to make me doubt, I say, "My sins are gone, You got me into trouble but Jesus got me out." I'm glad my sins are gone!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm living now for Jesus, I'm happy night and day, Because my sins are gone; My soul is filled with music, with all my heart I say, "I know my sins are gone!"
